text:
In the table of __FreeBSD_version values listed in the handbook,
	these values should be added

	2.1.5-RELEASE:                  199607
	2.2-current as 12 July 1996:    199608  (will certainly be bumped)

Fix: 

Add to handbook.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cat /usr/include/osreldate.h
